title: fdv3.1 Advisory - SGA Target

list.name: dbname
list.label: Database
list.query: SELECT value, label FROM ( SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT dbname AS value, dbname AS label FROM awr_advisory_sga) AS combined_results ORDER BY value;

list.name: instance
list.label: Instance
list.query: SELECT value, label FROM ( SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT instance AS value, instance AS label FROM awr_advisory_sga WHERE dbname = '$dbname' ) AS combined_results ORDER BY value;

list.name: start_snap
list.label: Start Snap
list.query: SELECT label FROM ( SELECT '' AS label UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label FROM awr_advisory_sga WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance' ) AS combined_results ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

targets.rawSql: SELECT sga_target_size_m, sga_size_factor, est_db_time_s, est_physical_reads, snap_time FROM awr_advisory_sga WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance' AND begin_snap = split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int ORDER BY sga_target_size_m;

panels.title: Estimated DB Time vs SGA Size

targets.rawSql: SELECT sga_target_size_m::float AS metric_x, est_db_time_s::float AS metric_y FROM awr_advisory_sga WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance' AND begin_snap = split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int ORDER BY sga_target_size_m;

panels.title: Estimated Physical Reads vs SGA Size

targets.rawSql: SELECT sga_target_size_m::float AS "SGA Size (MB)", est_physical_reads::bigint AS "Est Physical Reads" FROM awr_advisory_sga WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance' AND begin_snap = split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int ORDER BY sga_target_size_m;

WITH adv AS ( SELECT sga_target_size_m, sga_size_factor, est_db_time_s FROM awr_advisory_sga WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance' AND begin_snap = split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int ) SELECT (SELECT sga_target_size_m FROM adv WHERE sga_size_factor = 1 LIMIT 1) AS current_sga, (SELECT sga_target_size_m FROM adv ORDER BY est_db_time_s ASC LIMIT 1) AS recommended_sga, CASE WHEN (SELECT sga_target_size_m FROM adv WHERE sga_size_factor = 1 LIMIT 1) IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(( ( (SELECT est_db_time_s FROM adv WHERE sga_size_factor = 1 LIMIT 1) - (SELECT est_db_time_s FROM adv ORDER BY est_db_time_s ASC LIMIT 1) ) / NULLIF((SELECT est_db_time_s FROM adv WHERE sga_size_factor = 1 LIMIT 1),0) ) * 100.0, 2) END AS improvement_pct;

description: SGA Target Advisory dashboard (fdv3.1 style). Uses awr_advisory_sga and split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1) for snapshot.
